title: Remaining broad except Exception in TUI native.py and app.py
description: After fixing the 3 loops in native.py per project-LICHEN-8r0b, 15+ other except Exception as exc: remain in python/src/lichen/tui/native.py (lines ~1627 to 2495) and app.py. These may also swallow critical errors like KeyboardInterrupt. Should apply consistent BaseException + re-raise pattern project-wide for TUI. Independent oracle: Python exception hierarchy docs recommend against bare except Exception for system signals.
